summary: Test suite covers core module logic (retention policies, summary metrics, dry-run) but is critically incomplete. MISSING: CLI integration tests with real JSON fixtures; JSON fixture loading validation; ReferenceDate parameter tests; the entire act-based test harness explicitly required by task (fixture setup, `act push` execution, temp repo creation, `act-result.txt` output capture and validation of exact expected values); proper YAML parsing for workflow structure validation (uses string matching instead); workflow trigger/job/step structure validation; workflow job success assertion; ReferenceDate environment variable handling. Unit tests are well-organized with good factory functions but lack edge cases (zero/negative sizes, tie-breaking within same timestamp, deleter exceptions, invalid JSON) and error scenarios. Task explicitly requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' with test harness producing `act-result.txt`—this layer is entirely absent.
